name: Shrimp Scampi,sauted I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeInstructions:
1. HEAT OLIVE OIL IN A SKILLET OVER MEDIUM HEAT.
2. ADD MINCED GARLIC AND SWEET BASIL CHOPPINGS.
3. SAUTÉ GARLIC UNTIL FRAGRANT, ABOUT 30 SECONDS.
4. ADJUST SHRIMP TO THE SKILLET AND SEASON WITH SALT AND PEPPER.
5. SAUTÉ SHRIMP UNTIL THEY TURN PINK AND ARE COOKED THROUGH, BEING CAREFUL NOT TO OVERCOOK THEM.
6. STIRR IN MELTED BUTTER AND ADD MORE OLIVE OIL IF NEEDED FOR EVEN COOKING.
7. REMOVE FROM HEAT AND GARNISH WITH CHOPPED SWEET BASIL BEFORE SERVING.
